title: How to Reverse Engineer a Closed Source TradingView Indicator with AI (IT WORKS)
author: MichaelIonita
summary_bullets: That's right guys, you want to know how to reconstruct a trading view indicator even if you don't have access to the code.
Perfect because I found a way to do it using AI and some smart prompting.
I went ahead and reconstructed some of the famous indicators like the money line from Ivan on Tech and Annis Ribbons.

And in this video, I'm not gonna only show you how to do it, but I'm also gonna show you the performance of these indicators because once I have the code, I can turn them into a strategy to see their KPIs.
Are they better than what we already know?
Oh my God, this data is quite important and the results are quite shocking to be honest.
And it's not even hard to do if you watch this video because I will give you all the tips and tricks and also the prompts that you need.
Another amazing benefit of having the code of the indicator is that you can turn it into a strategy and automate it, right?
So buying and selling fully automatically on your exchange, I will tell you more about it later in this video.
And because this is such a game-changing video, it doesn't make any sense to skip forward because you're gonna miss out on some golden nugget information, right?
